title: Create an auto responder series of outbound emails

posts.author: Powerhouse (Richard Burton)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to automate sending out a series of emails starting when a new item is created. The 2nd email would go out 1 day later, the 3rd email 2 days later and the 4th email 4 days later.

How would I set that up? I did not see an automation in the Gmail integration where I could do that

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
There are many ways to approach this. Your specific use case might need a different approach… Here is one:

Create a date column for each mailer. Create a status column that would allow turning the sequence off. Add the following automations as needed.
